images.caption: Figure 1:We study the VQA setting over the personal camera roll, where an AI assistant can search and retrieve relevant photos from thousands of user images, enabling more personalized responses.
Figure 2:Overview ofcamroll. Left: photos are captured across 25+ countries. Right: smartphone users (in-house subset) take substantially more images than digital camera users (YFCC-100M).

Figure 3:Hierarchical memory for personal camera rolls, organized from low-level visual pixels (ℐ\mathcal{I}) to higher semantic abstractions (captions𝒞\mathcal{C}, eventsℰ\mathcal{E}). Agent interactions are designed accordingly, ranging from expensive tool (view,get) to cheaper one (search,grep,list).
Table 3:Quantitative comparison across methods and architectures. Our agentcamroll-agentachieves the best results, outperforming all baselines, including bare MLLM with full image captions.
Figure 4:Tool-call distributions across turns and question types.
Figure 4:Tool-call distributions across turns and question types.
